Corporate Training

AI training that fits
your actual business.

Off-the-shelf AI courses teach generic skills. We design programs around your team's real tools, real data, and real workflows — so learning translates into output from week one.

Talk to us about your team Explore our LMS
2,000+ Professionals trained
15+ Industries served
92% Satisfaction score
3 wks Avg. time to first cohort

The Problem

Generic AI training doesn't stick.

Your team sits through a two-day workshop on "AI fundamentals." They learn what a large language model is. They go back to their desks and nothing changes.

The issue isn't motivation — it's relevance. When training isn't connected to real tasks, real tools, and real workflows, it evaporates within weeks.

We build programs the other way around: starting with what your team actually does, then designing AI skills that make them measurably better at it.

Generic training

  • One-size-fits-all curriculum
  • Theoretical examples only
  • No connection to your tools
  • Forgotten in 2 weeks
  • No behaviour change measurement
vs

SnapSkill approach

  • Built around your actual workflows
  • Your data, your tools, your scenarios
  • Role-specific skill tracks
  • Reinforced over 4–8 weeks
  • Output-based completion criteria

Our Programs

Training for every layer
of your organisation.

For Leadership

AI for Executives

⏱ 1 day intensive 📍 In-person or virtual

Strategic AI literacy for C-suite and senior leaders. Covers AI opportunity assessment, risk governance, build vs buy decisions, and how to evaluate AI vendor claims.

Key outcomes

  • AI opportunity mapping for your business
  • Risk and governance framework
  • Confident AI investment decision-making
Enquire →

For Managers

AI-Enabled Management

⏱ 4-week program 📍 Blended: live + async

For people managers who need to redesign workflows, evaluate AI tools for their teams, and manage human-AI collaboration effectively.

Key outcomes

  • Workflow redesign using AI tools
  • Team AI readiness assessment
  • Change management for AI adoption
Enquire →

For Practitioners

AI Skills Bootcamp

⏱ 6-week cohort 📍 Live sessions + projects

Hands-on AI capability building for analysts, engineers, product managers, and domain specialists. Built around real tools and real deliverables.

Key outcomes

  • Prompt engineering for your domain
  • AI tool proficiency certification
  • Capstone project using your actual work
Enquire →

Custom

Bespoke Programs

⏱ Designed to spec 📍 Any format

Fully custom programs for specific functions — sales AI, HR automation, finance analytics, customer service AI. We design from scratch around your context.

Key outcomes

  • Function-specific AI skills
  • Custom scenario and case study development
  • Train-the-trainer option available
Enquire →

Our Process

How we design and deliver.

01

Discovery call

We understand your team, tools, current skills, and what "better" looks like for you.

02

Skill gap assessment

Optional pre-assessment to baseline current AI literacy across your team.

03

Program design

We build a custom curriculum using your tools, your workflows, and real scenarios from your industry.

04

Pilot cohort

We run a first cohort with a small group, gather feedback, and refine before scaling.

05

Full rollout

Program runs across your organisation with facilitator support and progress tracking.

06

Impact measurement

Post-program assessment and manager feedback to quantify behaviour change.

Let's design something
that actually works.

Tell us about your team — size, roles, current AI maturity — and we'll come back with a program design within 48 hours.

Start the conversation
